description: Add all 10 smart trading upgrades: session awareness, spread filter, lose/win streak detection, adaptive momentum, price action structure, multi-asset correlation live (DXY), imbalance zones/FVG, liquidity sweep detection, and spread-aware breakeven. All integrated into the existing signal generation flow with proper config, logging, and tests.
steps: 1. Add new config dataclasses in python_bridge/config/settings.py: SessionConfig (session hours for Asian/London/NY, position multipliers), SpreadFilterConfig (max_spread_multiplier=2.0, avg_spread_window=20), StreakConfig (lose_streak_reduce_threshold=3, severe_threshold=5, reduce_pct=0.5, severe_reduce_pct=0.75, win_restore_threshold=2, win_boost_threshold=3, win_severe_threshold=5, win_boost_pct=0.25, win_severe_boost_pct=0.5), AdaptiveMomentumConfig (high_atr_lookback=3, low_atr_lookback=7, atr_threshold_mult=1.5), PriceStructureConfig (swing_lookback=20), FVGConfig (enabled=True), LiquiditySweepConfig (lookback=20, min_recovery_pct=0.5)

2. Implement session awareness in signal_generator.py: Add _detect_session() method that returns current session (asian/london/newyork/overlap) based on UTC hour. Session affects: position sizing multiplier (asian=0.5, london=1.2, ny=1.0), strategy preference (logged only). Insert session check early in generate_signal() after cooldown check, before momentum. Log session info. Write session to bridge status.

3. Implement spread filter in signal_generator.py: Add _check_spread_filter(prices) method. Uses High-Low of last bar vs average High-Low of last N bars as spread proxy. If current spread > 2x average, return True (block). Insert spread filter in generate_signal() after session detection but before momentum calculation. Log when spread is too wide.

4. Implement lose streak and win streak detection in risk_manager.py: Add _consecutive_results tracking (deque of 'W'/'L'). Override/extend calculate_position_size() to apply streak multiplier. After 3 losses -> 0.5x, after 5 losses -> 0.25x. After 2 wins -> restore to 1.0x. After 3 wins -> 1.25x, after 5 wins -> 1.5x. Cap at max_lot_size. Add get_streak_status() method for logging. Add register_result(won: bool) method.

5. Implement adaptive momentum in signal_generator.py: Modify _compute_momentum_direction() to accept an ATR value. If ATR > threshold (1.5x average ATR from last 14 bars), use shorter lookback (3 bars). If ATR <= threshold, use longer lookback (7 bars). Pass ATR to the method from generate_signal().

6. Implement price action structure in signal_generator.py: Add _detect_price_structure(prices, lookback=20) method. Detect swing highs/lows in last 20 bars. If higher highs + higher lows -> uptrend. Lower highs + lower lows -> downtrend. Else -> no_structure. In generate_signal(), after momentum but before confidence gate: if momentum is BUY but structure is downtrend, reduce confidence by 0.15. If momentum is SELL but structure is uptrend, reduce confidence by 0.15.

7. Implement multi-asset correlation live (DXY) in signal_generator.py: Add _check_dxy_correlation(prices, cross_pair_info) method. If cross_pair_info contains DXY data or if a DXY price series is available from alt_data, check last 3 bars of DXY movement. Strong dollar (DXY rising) -> penalize BUY confidence by 0.10, favor SELL +0.05. Weak dollar (DXY falling) -> favor BUY +0.05, penalize SELL by 0.10. Integrate before the confidence threshold check in generate_signal().

8. Implement FVG (Fair Value Gap) detection in signal_generator.py: Add _detect_fvg(prices) method. Detect gap up: candle N low > candle N-2 high. Detect gap down: candle N high < candle N-2 low. Track unfilled FVGs. If price approaching an unfilled FVG in direction of momentum, boost confidence by 0.05. Integrate as confluence check before final signal generation.

9. Implement liquidity sweep detection in signal_generator.py: Add _detect_liquidity_sweep(prices, lookback=20) method. Pattern: price breaks below recent low (within lookback bars) then recovers above it in same/next bar = bullish sweep. Price breaks above recent high then falls back = bearish sweep. If bullish sweep detected AND momentum is BUY -> boost confidence by 0.10. If bearish sweep detected AND momentum is SELL -> boost confidence by 0.10. Integrate before confidence gate.

10. Verify spread-aware breakeven in Python_Bridge_EA.mq5: The code at line 673 already uses SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT) + InpBEProfitBuffer. Confirm it uses real-time spread (SymbolInfoInteger fetches live spread). Add a comment clarifying this is real-time. No functional change needed since it already works correctly.

11. Add comprehensive tests in python_bridge/tests/test_signal_generator.py and a new python_bridge/tests/test_risk_streaks.py: Test session detection for each session window. Test spread filter blocking. Test streak detection (3 losses reduces, 5 losses severe, 2 wins restore, 3 wins boost, 5 wins severe boost). Test adaptive momentum (short vs long lookback). Test price structure detection. Test FVG detection. Test liquidity sweep detection. Test DXY correlation adjustment.
acceptance_criteria: Running `python -m pytest tests/ -q` from python_bridge/ passes all new tests (pre-existing 5 candle pattern failures are acceptable)
Session awareness: _detect_session() correctly identifies Asian (00-08 UTC), London (08-16 UTC), NY (13-21 UTC) sessions
Spread filter: blocks signal generation when current bar range > 2x average range
Streak detection: 3 consecutive losses reduce lot by 50%, 5 losses reduce by 75%, 2 wins restore, 3 wins boost 25%, 5 wins boost 50%
Adaptive momentum: uses 3-bar lookback in high ATR, 7-bar lookback in low ATR
Price structure: detects uptrend/downtrend from swing points and adjusts confidence
DXY correlation: adjusts confidence based on dollar strength/weakness
FVG detection: identifies unfilled fair value gaps and boosts confidence when price approaches them
Liquidity sweep: detects stop hunts and boosts confidence for reversal entries
Spread-aware BE: Python_Bridge_EA.mq5 uses real-time spread in breakeven calculation (already implemented, just verify/comment)
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Claude/python_bridge && python -c "from strategies.signal_generator import SignalGenerator; sg = SignalGenerator(); print('Session:', sg._detect_session()); print('Import OK')"
cd /projects/sandbox/Claude/python_bridge && python -c "from strategies.risk_manager import RiskManager; rm = RiskManager(); print('Streak status:', rm.get_streak_status()); print('Import OK')"
findings: All 10 smart upgrades implemented successfully. 44 new tests pass. The 5 pre-existing candle pattern test failures remain (known issue - candle blocking intentionally disabled for M1 scalper mode). Used datetime.utcnow() which triggers DeprecationWarning in Python 3.12+ but is still functional. All new features integrate into the generate_signal() pipeline at appropriate positions: session/spread checks early (before momentum), price structure/DXY/FVG/liquidity sweep after momentum but before confidence gate, session multiplier applied to position sizing. POST-REVIEW FIXES: (1) Replaced datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(timezone.utc), (2) Fixed session fallback for 21:00-23:59 to return 'off_session' with 0.7x multiplier, (3) Added docstring to _check_dxy_correlation noting cross_pair_info requirement, (4) Added comment on streak multiplier explaining intentional max_lot clamping.
